---
title: "Total Soul 2022"
startDate: "2022-08-28T00:00:00.000Z"
tripPlan: content/trip-plans/total-soul-2022.mdx
destinations:
  - route: content/routes/total-soul.mdx
---

A challenging and sustained slab climb, decently well protected, pretty clean route! Bringing double ropes for the rappel was annoying though. Love the approach though! I got it clean except for one fall on P5. I surprised myself on getting some of the slabby moves!

## Gear brought

- Singles #0.3-2 - Worked perfectly, used all of these cams at least once
- 13 draws (7 sport, 6 single alpine), would have been fine with 12 (one less alpine).
- No nuts
- 60m rope + extra 70m for rappelling
- Two double slings for anchors
- No walkie talkies - comms were perfect!

## Timeline

- 4:55 AM - Driving
- 6:40 AM - Arrived
- 6:45 AM - Hiking (33 min hike)
- 7:18 AM - Base
- 7:36 AM - Climbing
- 12:44 PM - Top (5:08 hours climbing)
- 2:40 PM - Done rappelling (1:30 hr rappelling?)
- 2:50 PM - Walking out (25 min hike down)
- 3:15 PM - Car

## Approach

33 minutes, 1.4 miles, 906 ft gain. Love this mellow approach on a good trail!

![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_140201485.tJF78X0O-768x1024.jpg)
![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_140109556.Ays9yznK-768x1024.jpg)
![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_163107976.vx9pcIi-768x1024.jpg)

  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

## Pitches

### P1 - 5.6, 30m, 3 bolts

Climb a low angle short pitch past 3 bolts to a stance above a refrigerator block.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_141847516.OJUvVnI-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:430,&quot;y&quot;:412,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:415,&quot;y&quot;:391,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:377,&quot;y&quot;:350,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:26,&quot;y&quot;:957},{&quot;x&quot;:260,&quot;y&quot;:707},{&quot;x&quot;:380,&quot;y&quot;:536},{&quot;x&quot;:414,&quot;y&quot;:431},{&quot;x&quot;:399,&quot;y&quot;:384},{&quot;x&quot;:383,&quot;y&quot;:359}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:313,&quot;y&quot;:289,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:375,&quot;y&quot;:342},{&quot;x&quot;:370,&quot;y&quot;:331},{&quot;x&quot;:351,&quot;y&quot;:325},{&quot;x&quot;:335,&quot;y&quot;:320},{&quot;x&quot;:325,&quot;y&quot;:304},{&quot;x&quot;:315,&quot;y&quot;:293}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:308,&quot;y&quot;:279},{&quot;x&quot;:300,&quot;y&quot;:268},{&quot;x&quot;:293,&quot;y&quot;:258},{&quot;x&quot;:287,&quot;y&quot;:246},{&quot;x&quot;:278,&quot;y&quot;:242},{&quot;x&quot;:282,&quot;y&quot;:234},{&quot;x&quot;:279,&quot;y&quot;:224},{&quot;x&quot;:271,&quot;y&quot;:218},{&quot;x&quot;:271,&quot;y&quot;:215}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:355,&quot;y&quot;:312,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;P2&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:257,&quot;y&quot;:258,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;P3-8&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

### P2 - 5.9, ~45m, 4 bolts

Uses gear. Gear protected climbing past flakes leads you over a small roof to a few bolts and a slippery white dike.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_144745503.qEoNak0c-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:277,&quot;y&quot;:271,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:265,&quot;y&quot;:225,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:671,&quot;y&quot;:838},{&quot;x&quot;:596,&quot;y&quot;:531},{&quot;x&quot;:502,&quot;y&quot;:406},{&quot;x&quot;:393,&quot;y&quot;:358},{&quot;x&quot;:283,&quot;y&quot;:302},{&quot;x&quot;:272,&quot;y&quot;:273},{&quot;x&quot;:263,&quot;y&quot;:242},{&quot;x&quot;:262,&quot;y&quot;:232}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:423,&quot;y&quot;:333,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&lt;- A few cam options&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![Before the roof bulge](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_150735344.AVjpj0yf-768x1024.jpg)
![Above the roof bulge](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_150741023.UFriLqFl-768x1024.jpg)
![End of P2](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_153301255.wH6HtO7s-768x1024.jpg)

### P3 - 5.8, 35m, 5 bolts

Step left at the belay and friction climb your way directly past 5 bolts.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_152501740.pZ3GRSv1-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:164,&quot;y&quot;:315,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:352,&quot;y&quot;:233,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:338,&quot;y&quot;:990},{&quot;x&quot;:2,&quot;y&quot;:795}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:6,&quot;y&quot;:410},{&quot;x&quot;:152,&quot;y&quot;:326},{&quot;x&quot;:240,&quot;y&quot;:294},{&quot;x&quot;:318,&quot;y&quot;:261},{&quot;x&quot;:347,&quot;y&quot;:239}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:4,&quot;y&quot;:504,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&lt;- Bolt to left&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![End of P3](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_160431431.WQp8IJH6-1024x768.jpg)

### P4 - 5.9, ~45m, 6 bolts

Uses gear, save your #1 cam till near end of P4. Some friction moves lead to a long featured crack protected by bolts and gear. Super fun!

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_160514476.lkQFQHx-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:478,&quot;y&quot;:495,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:425,&quot;y&quot;:891},{&quot;x&quot;:482,&quot;y&quot;:516},{&quot;x&quot;:474,&quot;y&quot;:437},{&quot;x&quot;:422,&quot;y&quot;:359},{&quot;x&quot;:374,&quot;y&quot;:285},{&quot;x&quot;:332,&quot;y&quot;:230},{&quot;x&quot;:320,&quot;y&quot;:212},{&quot;x&quot;:306,&quot;y&quot;:194}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:303,&quot;y&quot;:191,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:5,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;x&quot;:391,&quot;y&quot;:284,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&lt;- Gear&quot;,&quot;ta&quot;:&quot;l&quot;,&quot;tb&quot;:false}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![End of P4](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_163107976.5Nm3UBJ-768x1024.jpg)

### P5 - 5.10a, 35m, 8 bolts

I fell right at the first bolt on my first try! Undercling and friction climb your way to the second bolt then traverse left (easy ledgey traverse), follow more bolts over a small roof and through some fun flakes to a large and comfy ledge

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_163112446.iJMWF1I-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:443,&quot;y&quot;:693},{&quot;x&quot;:392,&quot;y&quot;:436},{&quot;x&quot;:362,&quot;y&quot;:353},{&quot;x&quot;:349,&quot;y&quot;:307},{&quot;x&quot;:331,&quot;y&quot;:275},{&quot;x&quot;:246,&quot;y&quot;:272},{&quot;x&quot;:143,&quot;y&quot;:267},{&quot;x&quot;:166,&quot;y&quot;:252},{&quot;x&quot;:214,&quot;y&quot;:237},{&quot;x&quot;:266,&quot;y&quot;:217},{&quot;x&quot;:311,&quot;y&quot;:200}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:4,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:2,&quot;x&quot;:314,&quot;y&quot;:195,&quot;w&quot;:18,&quot;h&quot;:18,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:317,&quot;y&quot;:328,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:295,&quot;y&quot;:267,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![End of P5](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_170954571.UKYxt1_-768x1024.jpg)

### P6 - 5.10b, 40+m, 8 bolts

Climb a flake to more friction slab! Follow the bolts through a few roofs and a couple bouldery sequences. A very fun pitch.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_171000308.PTPWjR3-768x1024.jpg" 
  topoData="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:397,&quot;y&quot;:282,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:329,&quot;y&quot;:244,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:328,&quot;y&quot;:226,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:0,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;cp&quot;:[{&quot;x&quot;:480,&quot;y&quot;:672},{&quot;x&quot;:474,&quot;y&quot;:377},{&quot;x&quot;:414,&quot;y&quot;:297},{&quot;x&quot;:377,&quot;y&quot;:273},{&quot;x&quot;:342,&quot;y&quot;:263},{&quot;x&quot;:333,&quot;y&quot;:240},{&quot;x&quot;:327,&quot;y&quot;:228},{&quot;x&quot;:318,&quot;y&quot;:218}],&quot;nl&quot;:10,&quot;fl&quot;:10,&quot;lc&quot;:false},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:438,&quot;y&quot;:311,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;},{&quot;it&quot;:1,&quot;is&quot;:1.0514285714285714,&quot;ic&quot;:&quot;#ffff00&quot;,&quot;ia&quot;:1,&quot;lw&quot;:3,&quot;x&quot;:480,&quot;y&quot;:347,&quot;w&quot;:10,&quot;h&quot;:10,&quot;t&quot;:&quot;&quot;}]}"
  topoOverlaySrc="data:image/png;base64,"
/>

![First half of P6](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_173931041.UHbm3pky-768x1024.jpg)
![P6 crux](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_174055531.o6nVqsct-768x1024.jpg)
![End of P6](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_181355665.lswQYMK-768x1024.jpg)

### P7 - 5.8, ~45m, 5 bolts, pretty run out

Uses gear. Climb up and left from the belay to a bolt. Mantle over the roof and continue into the right facing corner. Keep trending up and left following bolts and corners until you reach two bolts connected by old webbing.

<RouteOverlay 
  imageSrc="https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_181404782.dmGv51Tj-768x1024.jpg"

/>

![Halfway up P7, trend up and slightly left following bolts](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_183934774.GMhQATdi-768x1024.jpg)

### P8 - 5.10b, 28m, 6 bolts

A short, tightly bolted pitch. Go left from the belay and battle steep slopey knobs until you find yourself at the summit. Belay from the big tree.

![End of P8](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_194444105.ZoTd21Q4-225x300.jpg)

## Top

There's actually nice spots to sit up top!

![Top!](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_194449858.vP9A68WJ-768x1024.jpg)

## Descent

Two 60's or two 70's are required to rappel (several rappels are 40-45m).

![](https://andrewbares.blob.core.windows.net/hiking-blog-images/2022/08/PXL_20220828_204942088.MBTOyz3A-768x1024.jpg)

In order to avoid a slanting rappel (since P7 traverses a bit), the ideal rappel route is to **scramble climbers right 10 feet from the top of P8** and then scramble bushwack **downhill ~20 ft to the edge of treeline** (kinda steep, butt slide down while self-belaying on bushes). On skiiers right, you'll find a bolted rap anchor on the cliff face on a nice ledge (there's also a tree that's slinged about 5 feet skiiers left, might as well use the bolted anchor though).

- **R1 (~45m)**: Double rope rappel from bolted anchor at treeline to top of P6
- **R2 (40+m):** Double rope rappel P6
- **R3 (35m): **Single 70m rope rappel P5 (or double 60m)
- **R4 (~45m):** Double rope rappel P4 (if have double 70m, one person reported combining R4 and R5)
- **R5 (35m): **Single 70m rope rappel P3
- **R6 (60m)**: Double rope rappel from P2 to gully (swing climbers left).
